## Related issues

<!-- Closes #123 / Refs #456 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐞 Bug fix (no breaking API changes)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (no breaking API changes)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (requires a major bump)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation / README / CHANGELOG
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor / cleanup / types
- [ ] 🧪 Tests / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint test` passes locally
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] If this is a new backend / platform — the README architecture table is updated
- [ ] If the menu-bar UI is touched — a screenshot is attached
- [ ] If config changes — README/CONTRIBUTING are updated
